title: Wasp Removal in North Castle, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional wasp removal services in North Castle, Westchester. Safe, effective wasp nest elimination for $350-$550. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with aggressive wasps around your North Castle property? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert wasp removal services throughout North Castle and greater Westchester County. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate wasp nests from residential estates, commercial properties, and everything in between.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Westchester communities like North Castle, we understand the unique pest challenges facing properties in this area. Our trained professionals use eco-friendly methods that protect your family, pets, and the beautiful natural surroundings that make North Castle special.
localContext: North Castle's mix of historic estates, wooded properties, and modern developments near areas like Armonk and Banksville creates ideal nesting conditions for yellow jackets, paper wasps, and hornets. Properties near the IBM campus, North Castle Community Park, and along Byram Lake Road frequently experience wasp activity during warmer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in North Castle?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal service throughout North Castle. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size. We service all North Castle neighborhoods including Armonk, Banksville, and surrounding areas.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 wasp removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the affected area, and a 30-day warranty. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and number of nests. We provide free estimates and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven techniques that are safe for your family and pets. Our technicians are fully licensed and follow strict safety protocols. We'll advise you on any temporary precautions needed during treatment, typically just staying indoors for 30-60 minutes.

faqs.question: When is wasp season in North Castle?
faqs.answer: Wasp activity in North Castle typically peaks from late spring through early fall (May-October). Nests grow largest in late summer, making wasps more aggressive. Early detection and removal in spring or early summer is ideal, but we provide emergency removal services year-round whenever nests are discovered.
